title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Don't Breathe 2
subTitle: Norman, a visually challenged navy veteran, lives in quiet solace with his foster daughter, Phoenix. However, he is forced to tap into his darker instincts when Phoenix is abducted.

title: The Cable Guy
subTitle: Chip, a cable technician, sets his sights on befriending Steven, a new customer whom he takes a fancy to. But when Steven spurns their friendship, Chip immediately starts to wreak havoc in his life.

title: Salt
subTitle: CIA agent Evelyn Salt's life takes an ugly turn when she is accused of planning the assassination of the Russian president. However, she flees and sets out to prove her innocence.
Micky, a maths professor, enlists five gifted students to use their abilities to win millions at blackjack in Las Vegas. He exploits their talents for personal gain in the glamorous casino city.

title: Premium Rush
subTitle: Wilee is a bicycle messenger who rides a single-gear bike with no brakes. His routine delivery turns into a dangerous chase when his last package of the day is pursued by corrupt police officers.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
subTitle: A single mother and her two children move into a farmhouse inherited from her estranged father. As they settle in, they discover their associations with Ghostbusters.

title: Hollow Man
subTitle: Sebastian Caine, a scientist, develops an invisibility serum. However, when he uses it on himself and is unable to reverse the effects, it results in horrifying consequences.

title: Drunken Master
subTitle: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

title: Madame Web
subTitle: After a near-fatal accident, New York City paramedic Cassandra gains the ability to see into the future. Soon, her visions lead her to protect three young girls from a mysterious enemy.

title: Battle: Los Angeles
subTitle: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
subTitle: When Van Helsing's invention goes awry, Johnny turns into a monster and Dracula becomes human. Later, they embark on a journey to find a cure before their transformations become permanent.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
subTitle: Peter Parker tries to stop the Vulture from selling weapons made with advanced Chitauri technology while trying to balance his life as an ordinary high school student.

title: Sony Pix HD
subTitle: Sony Pix HD

title: Sardar Udham
subTitle: Indian revolutionary Udham Singh seeks revenge on Michael O'Dwyer, Punjab's lieutenant governor, after his troops mercilessly kill hundreds of people in the Jallianwala Bagh massacre.

title: Bad Boys for Life
subTitle: Ageing bad boys Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett manoeuvre midlife crises, high-speed chases, and explosive collisions with an enemy who can set the world on fire to avenge Benito.

title: Monster House
subTitle: Three teenagers discover that their neighbour's house is actually a monster that hates children. They then decide to destroy the heart of the house and kill it.

title: Brightburn
subTitle: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

title: Blade Runner 2049
subTitle: K, an officer with the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a secret that could create chaos. He goes in search of a former Blade Runner who has been missing for over three decades.

title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
subTitle: Eddie Brock tries to revive his failing career by interviewing a serial killer, Cletus Kasady, who is on death row. When Carnage gains control over Cletus's body, he escapes from the prison.

title: Don't Breathe
subTitle: Three delinquents break into the house of Norman, a Gulf War veteran who is visually impaired, to steal his money. However, they discover that Norman is not as helpless as he seems.

title: Men in Black 3
subTitle: Agent J of the Men in Black goes back in time to prevent the assassination of his partner, Agent K, at the hands of an alien criminal named Boris the Animal.

title: Hellboy
subTitle: Hellboy is a demonic warrior who protects the Earth from paranormal threats. When an enemy from his past makes a comeback, it is up to him and his team to stop the villain once and for all.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
subTitle: Miles Morales travels the spider-verse and meets a league of spider-people as he fights a new enemy, the Spot. But upon trying to change his canon event, he is pitted against the other Spider-Men.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Ghost Rider
subTitle: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

title: The Equalizer 3
subTitle: As Robert McCall finds himself forming a new bond with the locals of an Italian town, the region's oppression by the Mafia triggers him to protect his people.

title: Charlie's Angels
subTitle: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
subTitle: A genetically modified anaconda and a giant crocodile escape captivity and enter a nearby lake. When the two massive creatures fight, the sheriff tries to prevent the town from being destroyed.

title: When a Stranger Calls
subTitle: Jill, a teenage babysitter, gets anxious when she starts receiving ominous anonymous calls. However, nothing could prepare for the horror she faces when she finds out where the calls are coming from.

title: Life
subTitle: As astronauts discover the first evidence of extra-terrestrial life on Mars, they begin realising that the life form is extremely intelligent and hostile.

title: Men in Black: International
subTitle: Agent M, a probationary member of the MIB, teams up with Agent H and uncovers a sinister plot that reveals a traitor in the organisation aiding an alien invasion.

title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
subTitle: The Spengler family must join forces with the original Ghostbusters to stop an ancient evil force from refreezing the world, whilst protecting their iconic New York City firehouse headquarters.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A documentary crew, who are on a mission to find a tribe named Shirishamas, help a snake hunter when they find him stranded. However, he forces them to risk their lives and hunt down an anaconda.

title: 2 Guns
subTitle: Two undercover agents, Robert and Michael, aim to expose Manny 'Papi' Greco, a drug lord. Unaware of each other's true identities, the two get into trouble when they finally meet Papi.

title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
subTitle: Ben and Zoey find themselves trapped in a series of deadly escape rooms with four others. They try to survive and find a way out as they slowly discover that they have played the game before.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Yaga bans Seth from using his magic because he can't control it. But, this ban makes it harder for Seth to stop the Bravery Quartet when they cause trouble at the academy.
